mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_admin_class (student_id, admin_class_id, enroll_year, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{adminClassId}, #{enrollYear}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT sac.*, s.name as student_name, ac.class_name, ac.class_code FROM student_admin_class sac LEFT JOIN student s ON sac.student_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = s.username COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LEFT JOIN admin_class ac ON sac.admin_class_id = ac.id WHERE sac.id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM student_admin_class WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND admin_class_id = #{adminClassId}
